response.step_by_step_log:
1. Identified performer as Murasaki Shion from video context.
2. Watched the video: Murasaki Shion speaks from 00:00 to 03:37.
3. At 03:47, observed on-screen text: "シオン" (Song Title: Shion), "作詞・作曲・編曲:じん" (Composer: Jin).
4. Performed web search for `Murasaki Shion "Shion" song Jin lyrics` to obtain the Japanese lyrics and English translation.
5. Mapped the musical performance segment from 03:37 to 05:00.
response.global_summary: A video segment featuring a farewell speech by VTuber Murasaki Shion, followed by a performance of her original song "Shion," composed and arranged by Jin.

scenes.description: Murasaki Shion gives a farewell speech, reading from a letter.
Murasaki Shion performs the song "Shion" on stage. On-screen text indicates composition/arrangement by Jin.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
真っ赤な夕空　青くなる星
心臓を焦がして　冷めない温度
半端に零した　声の残響と
半端に混ざった　花の色
きっと立ち止まって　芽を伸ばしたって
咲いた瞬間　散ってしまうのでしょう
いっそそれも　素敵な景色なんだって
きっとそんな風に　思えたら良かったって
言えない
言えない
「さよなら」なんて
まだ言えないまま　魔法が解けていく
バラバラになって　花になって　風に溶けていく
手を振れないまま　黙って立っている
私も...
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
The sunset sky is deep red, the stars are turning blue
Burning my heart, a temperature that won't cool down
The reverberation of a voice that mixed incompletely
The color of a flower that mixed incompletely
Surely, even if I stood still and stretched out my eyes
The moment it bloomed, it would scatter, wouldn't it?
Even if that too is a wonderful scene
If only I could have thought of it like that
I can't say it
I can't say it
"Goodbye"
The magic is breaking while I still haven't said it
Falling apart, becoming a flower, melting into the wind
Still not being able to say it, just keeping silent
I also...
